notes: Sister architecture to ModelDB 189347 (shares RGCmodel.hoc skeleton and HHst.mod). Already has a Python driver (offsetDSGC.py). Clean MIT/BSD licence. Would port cleanly using the same HOC-load-file pattern as t0008.
Extension of Poleg-Polsky architecture with bipolar delays; ModelDB entry not yet cloned. Would likely share MOD mechanisms with 189347 but has separate morphology + stimulus logic.
No ModelDB deposition found. Paper is experimental (two-photon imaging + knockouts); no computational model released. Excluded from port candidacy.
Model described in paper but no public code release located. Port candidacy depends on obtaining code from authors — out of scope for $0 local budget.

Search for public code repo returned no ModelDB or GitHub match. Paper focuses on nonlinear dendritic integration but the model may only be described in supplement. Contact authors for source; out of scope.
Not a compartmental model — uses a reinforcement-learning framework on retinal circuit outputs. Different class of model; not a candidate for the single-cell NEURON port pipeline developed in t0008.
